flows.description: M365 sign-in/UAL/CA queries with internal bearer + keyHash.
OSINT investigations, bucket scans, realtime threat feed (bearer).
Dispatch identity_secops tools with keyHash principal.

threats.title: Origin spoofing / CSRF on /mcp
threats.description: Forged Origin header to mount cross-site requests.

threats.title: Oversized request body
threats.description: Large body to exhaust isolate memory/CPU.
threats.mitigation: 10 KB body cap read before parse.

threats.title: Weak request attribution
threats.mitigation: Encrypted access log + hashed analytics principals.

threats.title: Distributed free-tier budget abuse
threats.description: Many IPs drain shared global budget.
threats.mitigation: Per-IP distinct-domain daily cap (12/day) added in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts:555-593.

threats.title: JWT alg confusion / none
threats.mitigation: HS256 pinned; alg checked before verify.

threats.title: Tier-claim tampering
threats.mitigation: Signature verified before claims; tier enum.

threats.title: Trial-key cache staleness
threats.mitigation: Trial-key cache hits re-check trialExpiresAt and evict stale entries (src/lib/tier-auth.ts:190-193).

threats.title: Auth-code injection/replay
threats.mitigation: PKCE S256; single-use codes with TTL.

threats.title: Stale tier after downgrade
threats.mitigation: Per-subject token-version (ver) revocation plus JWT TTL clamped to entitlement window (src/oauth/token.ts:167-181).

threats.title: STRUCTURED_RESULT leakage
threats.mitigation: Omitted for interactive clients; sanitized findings.

threats.title: Scanner as recon proxy
threats.mitigation: Offensive/multi-domain tools paid-gated via GATED_PAID_ONLY_TOOLS -> HTTP 403/-32003 (src/lib/config.ts:340-378).

threats.title: DNS rebinding TOCTOU
threats.description: Validated host resolves internal at fetch.

threats.title: DNS reflection/flood
threats.mitigation: Paid gating of multi-domain tools + distinct-domain cap bound reflection volume.

threats.title: DNS recon / cache snooping
threats.mitigation: Distinct-domain daily cap throttles enumeration breadth (src/lib/rate-limiter.ts:555-593).

threats.title: Distributed-IP bypass
threats.mitigation: Distinct-domain cap narrows per-IP botnet value; global DO ceiling unchanged.

threats.title: Internal tools default-open
threats.mitigation: internalLenientAuthGate secure-by-default: 503 if key unset, 401 on bad bearer (src/internal.ts:165-182).

threats.title: DO state manipulation
threats.mitigation: DO reachable only via in-account binding.

threats.title: OAuth code/JTI disclosure
threats.mitigation: AES-256-GCM KV envelope applied on the OAuth grants path (src/lib/kv-envelope.ts; src/internal.ts:299).

threats.title: Trial-key disclosure
threats.mitigation: Platform encryption at rest; bounded lifetime.

threats.title: bv-web unavailability
threats.mitigation: Static key fallback; free tier unaffected.

threats.title: Stolen API key invokes identity-secops tools
threats.description: A stolen/leaked paid-tier key can query M365 identity tools as that principal.
threats.mitigation: AUTH_REQUIRED_TOOLS 401 gate + keyHash backstop; ver revocation.

threats.title: Cross-tenant M365 log access
threats.description: Caller-supplied ms_tenant_id forwarded with trusted bearer; tenant entitlement enforced only in bv-web on the forwarded keyHash.
threats.mitigation: keyHash forwarded (src/tools/m365/proxy.ts:38); cross-service enforcement unverified from this repo.

threats.title: Tenant-ID enumeration via error codes
threats.description: Distinguishable m365_proxy_* error codes reveal tenant existence/authorization state.

threats.title: Unmetered M365 query volume
threats.description: Identity tools are in INTENTIONALLY_UNLIMITED_TOOLS, allowing cost/load amplification on bv-web and Graph.

threats.title: Surveillance via identity tools
threats.description: Authorized-but-overbroad principal monitors an org's sign-in/audit activity.
threats.mitigation: Read-only tool set; bv-web tenant scope; access logged.

threats.title: Compromised bv-recon forges intelligence
threats.description: A compromised bv-recon worker plants forged findings in customer reports.

threats.title: Recon payload prompt injection
threats.description: Attacker-controlled bucket/feed strings flow into finding metadata consumed by LLMs.
threats.mitigation: sanitize-upstream strips C0/ANSI and clamps; injection tests incomplete for bucket/feed spread.

threats.title: Cross-principal recon result polling
threats.description: Operation IDs are pollable with any valid key; ownership enforcement assumed in bv-recon.
threats.mitigation: Opaque UUIDs; no principal binding on poll (src/tools/osint-investigate.ts:115-145).

threats.title: Recon job flooding
threats.description: OSINT/bucket starts spawn expensive backend work on bv-recon.
threats.mitigation: Paid-only gating; request-dedup; per-tier daily quotas.

threats.title: People-OSINT abuse
threats.description: Username/email investigations used against arbitrary third parties.
threats.mitigation: People-OSINT restricted to owner/enterprise; logged per principal.

threats.title: TLS probe as internal reachability oracle
threats.description: Probe responses could leak internal-network reachability if bv-tls-probe lacks host validation.
threats.mitigation: Domain pre-validated by check_ssl sanitizer; probe-side validation assumed (src/lib/tls-probe-binding.ts:63-83).

threats.title: Forged TLS-version results
threats.description: A compromised bv-tls-probe skews SSL scores with fake legacy-TLS findings.
threats.mitigation: Operator-controlled binding; hardcoded literal version matching.

threats.title: Probe latency exhaustion
threats.description: Hanging probe targets consume the check_ssl latency budget.

threats.title: LKG tier outlives revocation during outage
threats.description: A key revoked while bv-web returns 5xx keeps its last-known-good tier up to 24 h.
threats.mitigation: LKG never consulted on 4xx; 24 h TTL (src/lib/tier-auth.ts:302-317).

threats.title: Agent-chat allowlist evasion
threats.description: Internal caller omits/alters x-bv-caller to escape the 13-tool read-only allowlist.
threats.mitigation: Allowlist enforced at call+batch with name normalization; bv-web gateway enforces independently (src/internal.ts:217-223,419-422).

findings.title: API key accepted via query parameter
Free-tier abuse via distributed IPs
Scanner usable as recon/amplification proxy
OAuth issuer from spoofable Host header
Open OAuth dynamic client registration
force_refresh cache-busting amplification
Domain validation hardening for homoglyph/IDN
Authentication & token-integrity controls (existing control)
SSRF egress controls (existing control)
Rate limiting, quotas & DoS budgets (existing control)
Information-disclosure controls (existing control)
Internal routes default to no bearer auth
JWT retains elevated tier after plan downgrade
Brand-audit discovery enables third-party enumeration
Trial-key tier persists during cache window
Internal isolation & dependency hardening (existing control)
Sensitive KV records rely on platform isolation only
Recon operation IDs are not bound to the requesting principal on poll
M365 tenant authorization is delegated cross-service on a forwarded keyHash
M365 identity tools are intentionally unmetered per-tool
Recon upstream payloads lack injection-focused test coverage
